text:
Claude Fable 5 just went public.

Anthropic's first Mythos-class model — the most capable AI they've ever released.

Built for tasks that span days.
Autonomous coding. Multi-stage planning. Sub-agent delegation.
1 million token context window.

This isn't a chatbot upgrade.
This is the agentic era going live.

We broke down what it means for builders on Tech Thursday.
Follow @layer8culture for the build. 🔵

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic Layer8Culture visual in a deep black environment with electric blue accent lighting, premium creator-tech atmosphere, late-night builder energy, documentary realism, human-centered AI themes, Black tech futurism, minimal composition, strong negative space, warm practical lighting, and high contrast. Vary the composition from post to post so the feed does not repeat — the SCENE SPECIFICS for THIS post decide the subject. Draw from a range of premium looks (do NOT default to the same person-at-a-desk shot every time), for example: a confident Black creator/host presenting direct-to-camera; a close detail of premium creator gear (mic, stream deck, dark walnut desk, the standalone 8 motif on a hoodie or mug); an over-the-shoulder build session; an abstract Afrofuturistic tech or data-visualization environment with glowing electric-blue nodes and grids; or an atmospheric branded studio space. Recurring brand cues when a scene fits: a blank neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel — do NOT render any text or letters; the wordmark is composited in afterward), the standalone 8 motif, a bookshelf washed in blue accent lighting. When a person appears they are a confident Black creator, engaged and intentional, never anonymous side profiles. The image should feel like a premium technology documentary and creative studio brand. COMPOSITION FOR TYPOGRAPHY: the LOWER THIRD of the 9:16 frame must be clean, uncluttered dark negative space for the composited headline. The UPPER THIRD must remain calm and atmospheric — avoid faces or fine detail up top — animated text beats will be composited there. Scene: a confident Black creator seen from an over-the-shoulder angle in a late-night premium studio — three large gently curved monitors glow in front of them, each displaying abstract electric-blue cascading pipeline and agent task-loop visualizations with no readable text or labels; the creator's hoodie has a large standalone 8 on the back in soft white; deep atmospheric black void fills the space around them; electric-blue ambient light rakes the scene from the sides; a blank neon panel glows faintly on the deep-black wall (no letters or text, just the outline glow); the lower third of the vertical 9:16 frame is pure clean dark negative space; the upper third is a dark atmospheric void with minimal fine detail. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography.
visual.headline: CLAUDE FABLE 5

text:
A billion people opened ChatGPT this month.

Most asked it to rewrite an email.

That's not a criticism — it's the reality of where mainstream AI adoption is.
The tools went global. Most people are using them to save minutes.
A smaller group is using them to build systems.

The gap between those two groups is widening fast.

Swipe for the full breakdown — and where the opportunity is.

Save this. Share it with a builder you know. 🔵

slides.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic Layer8Culture visual in a deep black environment with electric blue accent lighting, premium creator-tech atmosphere, late-night builder energy, documentary realism, human-centered AI themes, Black tech futurism, minimal composition, strong negative space, warm practical lighting, and high contrast. Scene: a dramatic bird's-eye abstract visualization of a vast crowd rendered as thousands of tiny electric-blue dots filling most of the 1:1 frame — the crowd is dense and uniform; near the center of the frame, a single figure is rendered in warm amber-white light, slightly elevated on a subtle glowing platform, facing a different direction than the crowd; the surrounding dots fade into deep black atmospheric space toward the lower edges; the lower quarter of the frame is clean dark negative space. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography.

text:
Be honest.

In the AI era — which one are you right now?

🔵 BUILDER — shipping things with AI.
⚪ LEARNER — still figuring it out.

No wrong answer. Drop it in the replies.
first_comment: Builder or Learner — where are you in the AI era right now? Reply below 👇
